title: Lockout/Tagout - Lessons Learned from Near Miss
description: Reviewed February 2025 LOTO near-miss incident at GT2 auxiliary panel. Walked through proper energy isolation verification steps including all energy sources not just primary. Emphasized voltage verification with calibrated meter before touching any conductor. Reviewed updated LOTO procedure and permit requirements for electrical work.
notes: All plant staff and current contractors attended. Signed acknowledgment forms filed. Full LOTO permit system audit results presented - 3 procedures updated. Testing and verification procedures reinforced.

title: Confined Space Entry - Cooling Tower Recoating
description: Reviewed OSHA 29 CFR 1910.146 permit-required confined space procedures for cooling tower basin work. Covered atmospheric testing requirements O2 LEL and toxic gas. Demonstrated proper rescue equipment deployment from exterior. Reviewed communications protocol between entrants and attendant.
notes: All cooling tower recoating contractor crew and plant attendants attended. Demonstrated Dräger multi-gas monitor operation. Conducted practice rescue drill. Entry/Rescue permits prepared and signed before start of work Monday.

title: Summer Heat Illness Prevention - Annual Review
description: Annual review of heat illness prevention plan. Updated WBGT index chart and work-rest ratios for turbine bay confined space work. Reviewed 2025 event and improved response protocol. Covered recognition of heat exhaustion vs. heat stroke. Reviewed location of cooling stations and medical response plan.
notes: All plant operations and maintenance staff. Updated heat illness plan distributed. New WBGT monitors installed at 3 locations in turbine bays. First aid team refresher scheduled February 1.
